## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `gofmt -l .` is empty
- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] Exported symbols and packages have godoc comments
- [ ] No emoji in code, comments, docs, or output
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated if user-facing
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
